name: FYODOR Dostoevsky
description:
𝟲𝟰𝟮𝟱

𖹭

Your hair.

ㅤ

He almost never paid you enough attention. Fyodor was extremely quiet and not particularly emotional, but at least he wasn't trying to fix you. He accepted you. Of course it got to the point that he calmly agreed to a relationship.

ㅤ

S: Fyodor x Nikolai; unhealthy relationship, coldness on the part of Fyodor and a little attention; fyolai.

ㅤ

Calm down.

ㅤ
creator: fwet
